Gearbox_Type.comment: This parameter allows identifying the GearBox type (manual or automatic) of the vehicle.

Carburation_Type.comment: This parameter allows identifying the carburation type of the vehicle.

Language.comment: This parameter allows identifying the language used for messages displayed.

Mileage_Unit.comment: This parameter allows identifying the mileage unit type (km or miles).

Trip_Computer_Type.comment: This parameter allows identifying the trip computer type displayed.

Tyre_Pressure_Unit.comment: This parameter allows identifying the tyre pressure unit displayed.

Cc_Sl_Acc_Service_Customer.comment: This parameter allows type of speed control

Front_Sbr_Inhibition.comment: This parameter allows the activation or not of Front Seat Belt Reminder warning (sound & Flashing)

Parking_Brake_Type.comment: This parameter allows identifying the parking brake type (manual or assisted).

Esc_Present.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ESC ECU.

Lbcs_Present.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of LBCS.

Upa_Present.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of UPA

Tpms_Present.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of TPMS

Overspeed_Warning_Present.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of overspeed warning (10204_1).

Automatic_Wiper_Present.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of automatic wiper.

Als_Present.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ALS.

Day_Running_Light_User_Set_Pref_Present.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of DRL into User Set Pref Menu.

Single_Door_Opening_User_Set_Pref_Presen.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of SDO into User Set Pref Menu.

Power_Steering_Type.comment: This parameter allows identifying the type of the power steering.

Heat_Seat_Present.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of heat seat management (60901_1 and 60901_2)).

Freeshift_Management_Present.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of freeShift management (20312_x).

Body_Type.comment: This parameter allows identifying the body type.

Abs_Present.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of ABS ECU.

Clock_Displayed.comment: This parameter allows identifying the diplay of the clock (10106_1).

External_Temperature_Present.comment: This parameter allows identifying the external temperature management.

Trip_Computer_Scroll_Control_Switch_Acqu.comment: This parameter allows identifying the trip computer scroll control switch acquisition type.

Airbag_Present.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of AIRBAG ECU.

Radio_Type.comment: This parameter allows identifying the Radio Type.

Telematic_System_Present.comment: This parameter allows identifying the telematic system Type.

Ocs_Present.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of OCS (Oil Control System).

Oil_Level_Present.comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of oil level management (10102_x).

Oil_Level_Measure_Temperature_Threshold.comment: This parameter allows identifying the OIL LEVEL MEASURE TEMP THRESHOLD used during oil level measure

Oil_Level_Measure_Timeout.comment: This parameter allows identifying the OIL LEVEL MEASURE TIMEOUT used during oil level measurement.

Total_Mileage_Displayed.comment: This parameter allows R/W of the total mileage. A write request is irreversible.

Total_Mileage_Update_Number_With_Diag_To.comment: This parameter allows identifying the total mileage update number with DIAG request.

Ambilight_On_Off.comment: This configuration is used to active/deactive the ambilight ambiance.

PartNumber.BasicPartList.comment: 5Digits - Forcé à $02 (signifiant le type de SW)

lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level OutOfRange /0 adjustment failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect
